name: codex-apps
description: Desktop apps and tools for Codex/GPT via Grok-Codex bridge. Includes Notepad, Chrome, and extensible app integrations.

apps.name: notepad
apps.description: Control Windows Notepad for typing, stories, and basic text tasks.

apps.name: chrome
apps.description: Browser control for searches, clicks, and web interactions via SendKeys and mouse.
